name: I missed a week of work after warehouse pallet collapse - how do they calculate lost wages?
description: 66% average weekly wage, state max applies.[3]

mainEntity.name: I missed a week of work after warehouse pallet collapse - how do they calculate lost wages?

acceptedAnswer.text: 66% average weekly wage, state max applies.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Utah/Idaho comp pays 66 2/3% of your average weekly wage for temporary total disability, up to state max (~$1,200/week).** Based on pre-injury earnings.[1][3] Key factors: prove via pay stubs; light duty reduces it. Submit doctor restrictions; track all time off. Payments start after 3-day wait.[4]
